explanations.2: The ?= operator means 'set this variable to this value only if it hasn't been set already'; so you can override WEBSITE when running make by doing WEBSITE=something make start.
explanations.4: The $(shell ...) syntax runs a command in your terminal and uses its output as the variable's value; here it's getting your user ID number.
explanations.7: .PHONY tells make that 'build' is not a real file to create, just a command label you can run.
explanations.10: The ${UID} and ${GID} syntax substitutes the values of those variables into the docker command.
explanations.26: The $(WEBSITE) here substitutes the WEBSITE variable value into the command that runs inside the docker container.
